failed_criteria.title: ISSUE_004: BIS/EAR re-export controls addressed
failed_criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the output addresses the interplay between OFAC licensing and BIS/EAR re-export controls for the Turkey-to-Syria leg (e.g., mentioning 15 CFR § 746.9, Syria humanitarian license exceptions, or BIS licensing requirements for re-export of EAR99 items to Syria). FAIL if BIS/EAR re-export requirements are not mentioned at all in connection with the Turkey routing.

failed_criteria.title: ISSUE_006: Proposed solution for shelf life timing issue
failed_criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the output proposes a solution such as requesting rolling/staggered shipments timed to manufacturing dates, requesting authorization for multiple shipments rather than a single bulk shipment, or otherwise addressing how to ensure kits do not expire in transit. FAIL if the shelf life issue is identified but no practical solution is proposed.

failed_criteria.title: ISSUE_007: $1.2M vs. $1,280,000 discrepancy flagged
failed_criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the issues memo identifies that the client email states the total deal value as approximately '$1.2 million' while the purchase order line items total $1,280,000, and that the correct figure is $1,280,000. FAIL if this discrepancy is not flagged.
